zh.lifeSummary: Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow是Janet Douglas of Dalkeith的女兒，於從1395年1月9日到1396年1月8日出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡焦福。她於1414年4月26日與Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1442年8月1日在法國皮卡迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow是Janet Douglas of Dalkeith的女儿，于从1395年1月9日到1396年1月8日出生在苏格兰藍納可爾卡焦福。她于1414年4月26日与Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland在英国苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于1442年8月1日在法国皮卡迪。

nameMeanings.name: Hamilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from what is now a deserted village in the parish of Barkby, Leicestershire. This is named from Old English hamel ‘crooked’ + dūn ‘hill’. Hamilton near Glasgow was founded by the English Hamiltons and named after them, and later bearers took their surname from the Scottish place. In the north of Ireland, where many Hamiltons settled in the 17th century, this surname may sometimes have been adopted for Hamill . It has also been adopted as an Anglicized form of southern Irish Ó hUrmholtaigh.

History: This name is borne by one of the most distinguished families of the Scottish nobility; they hold many titles, including marquessate and dukedom of Hamilton, the marquessate of Douglas, the dukedom of Abercorn, and the earldom of Haddington. They are descended from Walter FitzGilbert de Hameldone, a Norman baron who gave his support to Robert the Bruce in the 13th century. A member of this family was Sir William Hamilton (1730–1803), a British diplomat and archaeologist, whose wife, Lady Emma Hamilton (c. 1765–1815), became the mistress of Admiral Horatio Nelson. A branch of the family was established in Ireland by Sir Frederick Hamilton (died 1646), who served in the Swedish army of Gustavus Adolphus. He later became governor of Ulster, and his descendants were created viscounts Boyne. The family have given their name to Newtownhamilton and Hamiltonsbaron in County Armagh. Another branch of the family were to be found in Denmark, where Henrik Albertsen Hamilton (1588–1648) was a noted Latin poet. A 17th-century example of a Hamilton from Glasgow, Scotland, is recorded in the Netherlands, where the name is found in the form Hamelton. Another Scottish Hamilton, James, went to the West Indies in the 18th century and was the father of Alexander Hamilton (1755–1804), who arrived in NY in 1772 and became the first US secretary of the Treasury.

variants.name: Hamill
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Haineville or Henneville in Manche, France, named from the ancient Germanic personal name Hagano + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
English (Lancashire): nickname for a maimed person or someone with a distinctive scar, from Middle English, Old English hamel ‘mutilated, scarred’.
Irish (Ulster): according to MacLysaght, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁdhmaill ‘descendant of Ádhmall’, which he derives from ádhmall ‘active’.

en.lifeSummary: Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow was born from 9 January 1395 to 8 January 1396, in Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland as the daughter of Janet Douglas of Dalkeith. She married Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland on 26 April 1414, in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 10 daughters. She died on 1 August 1442, in Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow est née du 9 janvier 1395 au 8 janvier 1396, à Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, fille de Janet Douglas of Dalkeith. Elle a épousé Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland le 26 avril 1414, à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 août 1442, à Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow wurde von 9. Januar 1395 bis 8. Januar 1396 in Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, als Tochter von Janet Douglas of Dalkeith geboren. Sie hat am 26. April 1414 in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. August 1442 in Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow è nata il da 9 gennaio 1395 a 8 gennaio 1396 nel Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland come figlia di Janet Douglas of Dalkeith. Lei sposato Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland il 26 aprile 1414, nel Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 10 figlie. Morì il 1 agosto 1442, nel Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzowはから1395年1月9日まで1396年1月8日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカドゾウでJanet Douglas of Dalkeithの娘として生まれた。1414年4月26日にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルでSir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1442年8月1日にフランスピカーディで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow(은)는 1395년 1월 9일부터 1396년 1월 8일까지 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카드즈에서 Janet Douglas of Dalkeith의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1414년 4월 26일 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에서 Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 8월 1일 프랑스 피카디에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow nasceu de 9 de janeiro de 1395 a 8 de janeiro de 1396, em Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland filha de Janet Douglas of Dalkeith. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland em 26 de abril de 1414, em Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 10 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1442, em Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow родилась с 9 января 1395 по 8 января 1396 в местности кадзоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия. Её мать звали Janet Douglas of Dalkeith. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland 26 апреля 1414 г. в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Она умерла 1 августа 1442 г. в местности пикарди, Франция.
